ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Jun-25-2014 Continued To Jul-09-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-23-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-23-2013 Continued To Jun-23-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for and with Dan-Xia Bossard. Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator.

Mr. Der stated that he is working on the Substitution of Attorney. Ms. Bossard stated that she is fully committed to managing and wrapping up the estate. Mr. Der stated that the Family wants to make sure his Client receives 100% of the estate, and that the Cousins and Aunt are willing to do an agreement. Mr. Der also stated that everything is current on the condo mortgage, the taxes, etc., that he is trying to get Medi-Cal to waive the $3,200.00 Creditor's Claim and that there is $80,000.00 in mutual funds. Status on filing of the petition for final distribution was continued to June 23, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will not vacate the Order Suspending Administrator's Powers, but the Court will sign an order re-instating powers subject to filing of the substitution of Attorney and filing of an additional bond in the amount of $70,000.00.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Clarke. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear
Off Calendar Dec-23-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Continued To Dec-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that an Order to Appear was issued to the Administrator on November 27, 2013 and that the Administrator still is not present. The Court ordered the Administrator's powers suspended immediately. A further Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Dan-Xia Bossard to appear on December 23, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of Report of Status of Administration has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Continued To Dec-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel - Civil
Off Calendar Nov-14-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Albert Martin for Dan-Xia Bossard.

Mr. Martin stated that he has his Client's current address, that he has had no communication what so ever with his Client, that the Administrator will not respond to him and that she ceased to participate as soon as the medical liens showed up. In addition, Mr. Martin stated that he believes there is no plan to deal with the medical liens or sell the house. The Court granted the Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel (subject to review of the order). Status on filing of the Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Status of Administration was continued to December 4, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator to appear on December 4, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the above documents have not been filed.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. (Not Reported)
